description: A newly hired staff member needs help completing their benefits enrollment before the deadline.

nodes.task_description: Identify the new employee and confirm their enrollment deadline.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the employee has 3 days left to enroll.

nodes.task_description: Walk the employee through the different health plan options and retirement contributions in the HR portal.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly explains the options and helps the employee navigate the portal.

nodes.task_description: Confirm that the employee's selections have been successfully submitted in the system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent verifies the enrollment is complete in the HR system.
